creator: surya.prakashx.jagatha@intel.com
text:
Created attachment 208878
kernel panic while booting on Intel Server Board S2600WF (wolfpass) when Installing intel Volume management Driver(VMD) and enabling VMD in Bios

Product: Intel® Server Board S2600WF Family

Code Name:  Products formerly Wolf Pass
Intel® Xeon® Scalable Processors
Supports Volume management : Yes

1) Enabled "Volume Management Device (VMD)" in BIOS.
2) Downloaded source/patch for Volume Management Device Source from (https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd/commit/235ed49b64e7294cfe26e8c619c13717d7e44683)
3) installed Volume Management Device (VMD) on S2600WF (Wolfpass ) 
4) issued reboot
5) During Boot time kernel panic due to VMD (volume management Device)

please find the attached screenshot for the same.
